/usr/bin/ar qc liblwgl.a CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/Context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/buffer/FBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/buffer/IBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/buffer/RBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/buffer/UBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/detail/TexturePrivate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/render/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/render/ShaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/BindlessTextures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/CubeMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/ImageData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/Texture1D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/Texture2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/TextureArray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/TextureBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lwgl.dir/src/texture/TextureRef.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblwgl.a
